creator: julien@perdition.city
text:
On 07/27/2010 20:59, Daniel Gerzo wrote:
> Hi,

Hello,

>
> I believe this would have to be handled by each of the webserver port's
> individually itself, as this is basically handled by uwsgi module for
> the given webserver which requires webserver's source to compile.
>
> Is this a correct assumption?

I could be wrong but I don't think so :) If you look at 
www/rubygem-passenger (for example) it has APACHE and NGINXPORT in its 
OPTIONS.

Julien

-- 
No trees were killed in the creation of this message.
However, many electrons were terribly inconvenienced.
